description_long: This is a gaming laptop with a matte black chassis and red accent lighting, prominently featuring the ASUS and Republic of Gamers (ROG) branding. The keyboard is backlit with red LEDs, and several keys, including WASD and arrow keys, are highlighted in a lighter color for gaming emphasis. The screen is open and displays a video game in progress, indicating the device is powered on and in use. The lid has a bold ROG logo in red, flanked by two vertical red light strips, and the words 'REPUBLIC OF GAMER' are printed near the hinge. The laptop's build appears robust, with a wide screen and a full-sized keyboard including a numeric keypad. Stickers indicating hardware specifications are visible on the palm rest area.
description: A matte black ASUS ROG gaming laptop with red backlit keyboard, highlighted gaming keys, and a screen displaying a video game. The lid features a red ROG logo and light strips, with hardware stickers on the palm rest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a game, ASUS logo below the display, red backlit keyboard with highlighted keys, and hardware stickers on the palm rest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile, open screen, and the illuminated keyboard edge; stickers on the palm rest are partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view of the closed lid, displaying the red ROG logo, two vertical red light strips, and 'REPUBLIC OF GAMER' text near the hinge.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open screen, keyboard, and a clear look at the highlighted keys and palm rest stickers.
attribute_brand_logo: The ASUS logo is centered below the screen on the front bezel, and the Republic of Gamers (ROG) logo is prominently displayed in red on the center of the lid, flanked by two vertical red light strips. The ROG logo is stylized with angular lines forming an eye-like shape.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying a video game interface.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard uses a QWERTY layout, features a function row, numeric keypad, and highlighted WASD and arrow keys for gaming. The keys are backlit in red.
attribute_sticker_placement: Two stickers are visible on the left palm rest area, one indicating NVIDIA graphics and the other likely for Intel or system specifications.
